title: Fermented-Tender Bread Crumble
description: This Ukrainian dish features stale bread that has been marinated in a savory vegetable and herb mixture, then baked to perfection for a post-workout snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Chopped bell peppers
ingredients.amount: 1 small bell pepper, red or green

ingredients.name: Herbs (dill, parsley)
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon dried dill and 1 tablespoon chopped parsley

instructions: Slice the stale bread into thin crumbles.
In a large bowl, mix together onions, bell peppers, garlic cloves, olive oil, dried dill, chopped parsley, salt, and basil leaves.
Spread the marinated mixture on top of the bread slices.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm as a snack or meal accompaniment.
